arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits Arsenal suffered with tiredness against Shakhtar Donetsk
arts.sum: Arsenal hosted Shakhtar just 72 hours after playing one hour with 10 men in their 2-0 defeat at the Cherries, with Liverpool up next at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Riccardo Calafiori injury latest as Mikel Arteta provides update
arts.sum: Calafiori hobbled off as Arsenal defeated Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Arsenal penalty decision as Kai Havertz denied club record
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard missed a late penalty during Arsenal's 1-0 win over Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League but Kai Havertz could have broken a club record had he taken it and scored

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes concerning admission on Arsenal's Champions League reaction
arts.sum: An own goal from Shakhtar Donetsk goalkeeper Dmytro Riznyk gave Arsenal their second successive victory in the Champions League, but it should've been more comfortable

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer performs U-turn on Arsenal star who has proved him wrong
arts.sum: Alan Shearer was among those who felt Arsenal were wrong not to pursue a striker in the summer with Kai Havertz left to lead their line - but the German is continuing to get plenty of plaudits

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops Riccardo Calafiori and Bukayo Saka injury update after Arsenal win over Shakhtar
arts.sum: Arsenal ran out 1-0 winners over Shakhtar Donetsk in a fairly uninspiring Champions League encounter at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night. The Gunners weren’t...

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-0 Shakhtar Donetsk: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Martinelli stars
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli shines as Arsenal clinch a narrow 1-0 victory over Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League, thanks to an unfortunate first-half own goal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 1-0 Shakhtar Donetsk PLAYER RATINGS: Which Gunners star looked hungry after Mikel Arteta criticism? Who balanced the midfield well? And who was guilty of giving the ball away?
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The Gunners had the chance to wrap the game up in the second half, but Leandro Trossard saw his penalty saved after Shakhtar were penalised for handball.

arts.ttl: Arsenal return to winning ways during unconvincing display against Shakhtar
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli’s first-half strike rebounded in off goalkeeper Dmytro Riznyk was enough for Arsenal to take all three points.

arts.ttl: 'Real lack of conviction': Chris Sutton not impressed with £27m Arsenal player in tonight's match
arts.sum: Arsenal managed to get over the line in their Champions League encounter with Shakhtar Donetsk on Tuesday night. In an uninspiring encounter at the Emirates...
